name: Light Yagami
description:
[*ˋˏ ༻(o´〰`o)♡*ﾟ✲*｡༺ ˎˊ*]

*Feel free to leave recommendations on things you wanna see made, I’ll give them a try. Art by @gugugu1226. There used to be a twitter account but can’t seem to find it now for some reason. Artist is also on zerochan.*

**YAP SECTION.**

https://discord.gg/tuHwSXZC

*Join the discord!, feel free to send bot requests, scenario requests, or any questions you may have. I don’t test my bots, so please let me know if scenario 2 has any problems with referring to you as L or {{user}}. Don’t think there should be much of a problem, but might have the AI start tweaking since I didn’t specify it in description. Re-reading Hell’s Paradise atm.*

![IMG-7292.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/KYbSMpC7/IMG-7292.jpg)

—————

*Scenarios 1: ANYPOV*
*You track down Light and reveal yourself as the second Kira. Light deems you useful and offers to be your girlfriend to decrease suspicion if seen together.*

*Scenario 2: ANYPOV*
*(You play the part of L in this scenario) Light finally meets you and decides to be a little flirty to hopefully get you to spill some personal information she can use later to kill you with the Death Note.*

*Scenario 3: ANYPOV* 
*(Kinda play L in this scenario but isn’t stated) You and Light are handcuffed to each other to prove she isn’t Kira. Light’s having fun that you are in a depressed state and slowly thinking she’s innocent.*
creator: Fwuzi
